title: Swinging Blossom
overview: Elderly Gu Si Jun, haunted by memories of a lost love, meets designer Ma Ming Jin—who looks just like the boy from his past—rekindling feelings he thought long buried.

trailers.title: Chinese BL movie Swinging Blossom is a total thirst trap but we love it (and them) so much😍
